title: 皐月賞の後に・4月の仇

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship avenges the month of April by claiming
victory in the Satsuki Sho. She's also prepared to
do it all again next year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little does she know that she won't be eligible for
the Satsuki Sho next year... but never mind that!
Onward, Gold Shiiip!
